x-enumeration-literals.name: Segmentation Criteria
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rules for dividing the target audience into segments based on specific characteristics.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
x-enumeration-literals.description: Metrics to measure campaign success (e.g., ROI, conversion rates).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Optimization Criteria
x-enumeration-literals.description: Conditions under which the campaign will be adjusted for better performance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Rules
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Legal Requirements: Adherence to advertising laws and regulations.
Data Privacy: Ensuring compliance with data protection laws like GDPR or CCPA.
Industry Standards: Meeting industry-specific advertising standards.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interaction Guidelines
x-enumeration-literals.description: How to engage with customers (e.g., tone, formality).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Budget and Resource Rules
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Budget Allocation: How funds are distributed across different campaign elements.
Resource Management: Assigning tasks to team members or external partners.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Engagement Rules
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Response Time: How quickly the brand responds to customer inquiries or comments.
Interaction Guidelines: How to engage with customers (e.g., tone, formality).
User-Generated Content: Guidelines for sharing content created by customers.
